summary:
DIVINE VISITATION AND SPIRITUAL REBUKE: Brandon shares that he recently received two strong words from the Lord and experienced a visitation from the Father. During this encounter, God issued a rebuke, instructing Brandon that he was not taking his spiritual calling seriously enough and was spending too much time interacting on online platforms. God commanded him to eliminate carnal distractions, abandon shallow prophetic levels, and separate himself to deliver warnings to the people. Brandon notes that God referenced Kenneth Hagin as an example of a spiritual pillar who stood the test of time by deeply teaching the word, rather than just being a temporary fixture in the prophetic realm.

GLOBAL ACCELERATION AND UNPRECEDENTED TIMES: Brandon reports that God spoke to him regarding a recent meeting between President Biden and Benjamin Netanyahu. According to Brandon, God declared an impending acceleration of global events, specifically mentioning wars, financial systems, atmospheric and weather conditions, and signs in outer space. Brandon states that the Earth is entering an era of unprecedented times and warns that the broader body of Christ and the prophetic community remain spiritually asleep to these impending shifts. He also notes an upcoming shift toward cryptocurrencies and specific warnings regarding the year 2024.

CONFLICT IN ISRAEL AND BORDER THREATS: Brandon recounts praying over a ground invasion in Israel and seeing plots against soldiers. He states that God instructed him to pray against explosives and booby traps designed to harm both military personnel and hostages. In a subsequent vision of the region, Brandon observed a spiritual wall of protection made of light over Israel, signifying God honoring His covenant. However, he also saw walls of demonic activity along the borders from Egypt and was instructed to intercede against sneak attacks originating from the Mediterranean Sea. Brandon also mentions observing the United States, describing the nation as being covered in a gray sludge with people crossing the southern border, though some light still remained. When asking God about a potential attack on Friday the thirteenth, Brandon was told that surprise attacks will not be announced in advance and that constant prayer against hidden threats is necessary to avoid being blindsided.

VISIONS OF HEAVEN AND ANCIENT TEXTS: Brandon describes a vision where the atmosphere split open, revealing Heaven invading Earth and God seated on His throne. He details seeing liquid lava resembling honey with gold dust flowing from the throne. Brandon states that his spiritual eyes were opened to see inside the Father, describing Him as an endless dimension filled with unique stars, with light acting as His skin. He reports seeing the silhouette of God's face, a crown, and three massive blue sapphires glowing with blue fire, which Brandon states represented the Father, the Son, and the Holy Ghost. Additionally, Brandon describes seeing a granite wall etched with fire containing ancient angelic texts comprised of triangles, circles, waves, and squares that have existed for millions of years.

THEOLOGICAL WARNINGS ON SIN AND REPENTANCE: Brandon relays messages regarding the imminent return of Jesus Christ, emphasizing the need for spiritual readiness. He warns against compromising or living in sin. He urges individuals to live separated lives, practice repentance, and maintain daily communion with God, comparing the required readiness to the biblical parable of the virgins keeping their lamps full.
rawData: [June 17, 2024]-[I had a visitation from the Lord when I was praying for Israel]-[https://youtu.be/sJBSe3CcqGQ]-[Good morning, family! I'm excited to be with y'all today. I have a pretty strong word from the Lord. I just got off social media completely; this word was so strong. I've had two very strong words in the last week from the Lord. I had one visitation from the Father, and the presence of the Lord filled my house so strongly—I can honestly tell you I've never felt the presence of the Lord like that before. It shook me and gave me a renewed fear in Him of how close we are to Jesus coming. I'm going to start off with this: He told me, 'It's time to get serious. You're not serious enough; you're not pushing and pursuing enough for what's coming.' He said there's a shifting taking place. It all started while I was praying over Israel, and He was speaking to me about the meeting that President Biden had with Benjamin Netanyahu yesterday. He said there's going to be an acceleration of times and an acceleration of things now. You'll see an acceleration with war, with financial stuff, and with the signs of the heavens—outer space stuff. There's going to be acceleration with the weather and our atmosphere. He said these are times like you've never seen before; the Earth has never experienced what it's about to experience in the coming days. It is an acceleration into unprecedented times. We have never in history experienced what we're about to experience. There was so much pressure in the Spirit when He said this. He warned me about what's coming and said, 'The body of Christ is not awake. The people in the prophetic realm are not awake.' He was talking about coming up higher and said, 'The level you're operating in right now is a very shallow level. It's time to come up higher with Me; it's time to separate yourself even more than you already have.' He said, 'Brandon, there's a level of prophetic that the world has never experienced before, and you must separate yourself to hear Me closely for what is coming to warn the people.' He said many of His people are not hearing or listening. We are in very serious times, for the coming of His Son is at hand, yet people are asleep. Some feel they are awake, but they're still not. He was even correcting me, saying I was spending way too much time talking to people on Facebook and answering questions. He said that's not what I'm here to do; I am to seek Him, stay at His feet, and deliver the word He has for the people. It was a rebuke, so I erased Facebook and all the things that were a distraction. I want to go higher; I don't want to be in the shallow water. I want to be over my head, all the way to the bottom, saturated and controlled by the Holy Ghost for these last days. He had me praying for the tunnels in Israel for the ground invasion, and I saw things plotted against the soldiers. The Lord warned me to pray against booby traps and explosives rigged to harm people, including the hostages. We need to intercede for those people, sending angels to help because the enemy is ruthless, without a conscience, like barbarians. I won't go into a lot regarding the tie between Israel and the United States; it's just not smart. This is the second part: after He warned me about the acceleration of war, times, finances, and the shift to cryptocurrencies, He warned me about 2024 and what's coming. In my prayer time, when the glory manifested so strongly, He warned me again about coming up higher. It's been six days since my visitation, and He said, 'It's time to come up higher in the prophetic realm and in walking with Me, for I long for you to abide in the fire.' Suddenly, I saw the heavens split above me—a massive break in the atmosphere—and I saw the Lord seated on His throne, the great God Jehovah. I saw this massive light coming out and Him seated on His throne. I want you all to grasp this: Heaven is invading Earth now. It's an invasion of Heaven on Earth like we've never seen. I saw a liquid lava flowing out of the throne of God that looked like liquid honey. It was moving slowly but beautifully, with sparkles of gold dust inside, oozing out onto the Earth. It was tiered as I was looking up in the throne room. Then the Lord allowed me to see inside of Him. A lot of you will probably squawk about this, but I really don't care. God is light, and in Him there is no darkness at all. He allowed me to see the light as His skin, and then he allowed my spiritual eyes to see inside of the Father, great El Elyon, the most high God. I say this with fear and reverence: the light is like His skin. Inside Him, He was endless—His own dimension. It looked like a different kind of light, with unique stars shining all inside of Him. It moved like it was alive, transparent and spirit. It had a shape and was taking form, though it's hard to explain. I saw the silhouette of His face from afar, with a crown on His head. Inside His head, I could see three beautiful blue sapphires—huge ones. All around was a beautiful light like blue fire, making the sapphires glow. Around His face, I could only see His chin and the back of His head; everything else was fire radiating a captivating blue light. I was fixed on it; I felt like I was melting like wax in my home. It was the most holy moment, seeing a glimpse of the silhouette of the Father. Then He said, 'Focus and see this wall.' Upon the wall was ancient text, eons of time, with angelic writing engraved into stone with fire. This was writing on a granite rock with triangles, circles, waves, and squares. He told me it was an ancient text etched in for millions of years. I still don't have the full revelation of why He showed me this, but it was being downloaded like a fire hydrant. He said, 'My prophetic people are thinking too carnal; it's time to come up another level.' He even told me my thinking was too shallow. He asked, 'Do you know the difference between a flash in the pan and someone who stands the test of time?' He told me not to be a flash in the pan but a pillar who teaches the word. He brought up brother Kenneth Hagin, saying brother Hagin didn't just give a word of the day; he taught the people how to live by faith and stand on the covenant. To stand the test of time, you must teach the word. Too many prophetic people are just a flash in the pan and will burn out. It's about getting in the word and teaching the people how to pray. He said, 'When you seek Me daily and come out of carnal thinking, I will give you those words.' We are in a season of great birthing pains, more than ever before. What we've experienced is nothing compared to what is about to happen. He said this as a warning to sit at His feet and make Him priority number one. He was showing me levels of the prophetic: ankle-deep, waist-deep, knee-deep, and then over the head. He said, 'Brandon, there's so much more than what you're seeing on YouTube; you're just scratching the surface.' If you abide in Him, sit at His table, and take your seat in heavenly places above principalities and powers, you walk in dominion. It's like breathing: inhale the Father, exhale. He said, 'Sit at My throne, and that's when you give the word to the people.' Going back to the three sapphires, I believe they represented the Father, the Son, and the Holy Ghost—all three are one inside of Him. My words in the English vocabulary don't do it justice. It was a lot of correction for me to separate myself from comments and worrying about what people think. He's showing me it's about separation and flowing in the Holy Spirit. Then He showed me Israel. I saw darkness all around it like a wall, but light came down from Heaven. I was above the Earth looking down, seeing a wall of protection in the spirit realm over Israel. He was honoring His covenant. He told me to pay attention to the Mediterranean; while there was no darkness on the sea, there were walls of demonic activity on the borders from Egypt all around. I interceded against sneak attacks from the sea. Then He took me over America, and I saw the southern border with people coming across. America looked gray, with a gray sludge over it, but there was still light shining; it was not total darkness. I asked if there would be an attack on Friday the 13th. He laughed and said, 'Brandon, they're never going to announce when that's going to happen.' He said it's a surprise attack, like Israel's, so you must pray against hidden things so you aren't blindsided. Nothing happened on those days, but He was telling me to stay on my guard. I'll end there. This bell is our new notification signal, so please subscribe if this video blessed you. I won't share more of the vision right now as I don't feel it's wisdom. Let's pray we are always in the right place at the right time. The eclipse was very significant—a sign in the heavens. Things are fixing to get amazing; the light will get lighter and the dark darker. Jesus Christ is coming. People argue about 'once saved, always saved,' but I'm telling you, you need to listen to those walking with Jesus. You can backslide, so get your heart right. I'm not here to condemn you, but to lift you up. Don't compromise or live in sin. You won't go to hell for smoking a cigarette, but those who practice sin without repentance are on the 'Highway to Hell.' We should be like the virgins keeping our lamps full, having communion with Him daily. The wages of sin is death. Jesus said, 'Go and sin no more, lest a worse thing come upon you.' We have to live separate lives for Him. I walk with Jesus, and if you listen, I'll help you. We're at a point of separation; it's not a game anymore. Choose the Lord today with all your heart. Father, we thank You that You are a loving God, full of mercy. Your mercies are new every morning. You healed our diseases and took our infirmities. No weapon formed against us shall prosper. We take authority over the devil in the name of Jesus and tell him to cease and desist. We take authority over demonic spirits coming against our children. We call in wayward children and unsaved loved ones, and we call laborers across their path. I pray for the salvation of that man's wife; soften her heart and give her an experience with You in the midnight hour. For those believing for their husbands, let the glory of God shake them in their sleep. Give them a dream of You, or even of hell, to lead them to Jesus. Let the natural become supernatural. We plead the blood of Jesus over our loved ones and call for the restoration of marriages and households. We are the salt and light of this earth. We lay hands on the sick, cast out devils, and raise the dead. We pray for revelation knowledge and that the eyes of our understanding be enlightened to know You intimately. We are joint heirs with Jesus Christ, redeemed from the curse of the law. By Your stripes, we are healed. You made a display of triumph over the devil and gave us authority. We take authority over addictions, perversions, and drugs. We bind depression, anxiety, and fear. We call for hormone balance over serotonin, cortisol, and adrenals. I thank You for babies and restored marriages. I thank You for spiritual babies growing through this channel. They will rise up, take their authority, and steamroll the devil—a toothless lion. We are not afraid; we raise the sword of the Spirit. We renew our minds and go from the ankle-deep water to the deeps. We give You praise in Jesus' name, amen. I'm not on Facebook anymore; it's time to go deeper in the word. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you, and we love you. Have a blessed day. Bye-bye.]
